title: atractocarpus fitzalanii subsp. fitzalanii
intro: Atractocarpus fitzalanii subsp. fitzalanii, also known as the 'Kava Cordyline', is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Atractocarpus fitzalanii subsp. fitzalanii include pain relief, reduced anxiety and stress, improved sleep quality, and immune system support. Herbal preparations of the plant are commonly used in traditional medicine, and it can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
